metrics.propose_text:
{
  "hypothesis": "Price momentum multiplied by z-score normalized volume growth predicts 5-day forward return.",
  "concise_knowledge": "When volume growth is positively skewed and momentum is positive, 5-day returns are more likely to be positive.",
  "concise_observation": "IC = 0.035 with improved stability, suggesting the factor structure is working but can be refined.",
  "concise_justification": "Positive momentum indicates trending assets, and higher volume growth indicates stronger buyer interest, both contributing to future price increases.",
  "concise_specification": "Cross-sectionalfactor of z-score normalized 5-day momentum and 5-day volume growth, predicting 5-day return."
}

propose_json.hypothesis: Price momentum multiplied by z-score normalized volume growth predicts 5-day forward return.
propose_json.concise_knowledge: When volume growth is positively skewed and momentum is positive, 5-day returns are more likely to be positive.

propose_json.concise_justification: Positive momentum indicates trending assets, and higher volume growth indicates stronger buyer interest, both contributing to future price increases.

metrics.construct_text: {"Momentum_Volume_Normalized_5D": {"description": "Z-score normalized 5-day momentum multiplied by the sign of 5-day volume growth.", "variables": {"$return": "daily return", "$volume": "daily volume"}, "formulation": "ZSCORE(TS_MEAN($return, 5)) \\cdot SIGN(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5))", "expression": "ZSCORE(TS_MEAN($return, 5)) * SIGN(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5))"}, "Momentum_Volume_Rank_5D": {"description": "Rank of Z-score normalized 5-day momentum multiplied by the sign of 5-day volume growth.", "variables": {"$return": "daily return", "$volume": "daily volume"}, "formulation": "RANK(ZSCORE(TS_MEAN($return, 5)) \\cdot SIGN(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5)))", "expression": "RANK(ZSCORE(TS_MEAN($return, 5)) * SIGN(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5)))"}, "Momentum_Volume_Score_5D": {"description": "Z-score normalized 5-day momentum divided by the absolute value of 5-day volume growth.", "variables": {"$return": "daily return", "$volume": "daily volume"}, "formulation": "ZSCORE(TS_MEAN($return, 5)) / (ABS(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5)) + 1e-8)", "expression": "ZSCORE(TS_MEAN($return, 5)) / (ABS(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5)) + 1e-8)"}}

Momentum_Volume_Normalized_5D.description: Z-score normalized 5-day momentum multiplied by the sign of 5-day volume growth.

Momentum_Volume_Rank_5D.description: Rank of Z-score normalized 5-day momentum multiplied by the sign of 5-day volume growth.

Momentum_Volume_Score_5D.description: Z-score normalized 5-day momentum divided by the absolute value of 5-day volume growth.
